name: input-otp
description: A segmented one-time-code input rendered server-side: N native single-character <input> slots + a hidden `name` mirror that submits the joined value in a plain POST form (zero wire round-trips mid-entry). The auto-advance / paste-fill / backspace-nav choreography is a CSP-clean typed-TS enhancer. Server-first PARTIAL + enhancer (ADR-0012); replaces the <lv-input-otp> Lit island. WAI one-time-password-field ARIA (role=group + per-slot Character N of M labels).
docs: Copies the input-otp partial to your JTE root at lievit/input-otp.jte (reached as @template.lievit.input-otp(name=..., length=6, type="numeric")) and the CSP-clean enhancer to your alias root at lievit/input-otp.enhancer.ts. Import the enhancer once from your entry module and call enhanceAllInputOtp() on load (and after any DOM swap). The slots POST the joined value under `name` via the hidden mirror with zero wire round-trips mid-entry; the value is server-bound at POST. The source is yours: edit freely.
